# Jiandong Ding (丁建栋)

Jiandong Ding is an AI Architecture Expert and Senior Algorithm Expert at Huawei Technologies in Shanghai, China.

## Research Focus

- Generative recommender systems and LLM-driven recommendation
- Trustworthy AI, causal inference, unbiased learning, and fairness in ranking
- System efficiency for retrieval architecture, model compression, and edge-cloud collaborative AI
- LLM agents and data intelligence for business analytics workflows

## Core Pages

- Home: https://jdding.github.io/
- Publications: https://jdding.github.io/publications
- Patents: https://jdding.github.io/patents
- Collaborations: https://jdding.github.io/collaborations
- FAQ: https://jdding.github.io/faq/

## Structured Data

- Research JSON: https://jdding.github.io/api/research.json
- Publications JSON: https://jdding.github.io/api/publications.json
- Knowledge graph JSON: https://jdding.github.io/api/knowledge-graph.json
- Extended sitemap: https://jdding.github.io/sitemap-extended.xml

## Selected Work

- arXiv 2026: SkillResolve-Bench for same-capability ambiguity in agent skill retrieval
- arXiv 2026: SIDInspector diagnostic resource for semantic-ID tokenizers
- WWW 2026: Hierarchical and Preference-Aware Generative Recommendations
- AAAI 2026: Invariant Feature Learning for Counterfactual Watch-time Prediction in Video Recommendation
- WSDM 2026: RPE4Rec for high-efficiency dynamic retrieval
- KDD 2024: Unified low-rank compression for CTR prediction
- ICSOC 2024: BIS NL2SQL benchmark for business intelligence
- NeurIPS 2021: DP-SSL for robust semi-supervised learning

## Contact

For collaboration inquiries, use jdding [at] fudan.edu.cn.
